---
title: "August 2025"
date: 2025-08-01
categories: [2025, Q3]
description: "National monthly summary of NMC notifications for August 2025 — Category 1 & 2 conditions, provincial breakdown, data quality, and NMC App statistics."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **1 – 31 August 2025**. Data sourced from the NMCSS.
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2025-08-monthly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2025-08-monthly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2025-08-monthly-report.docx"}
